gates.title: Packaged installs and updates keep runtime metadata aligned with the published npm package
evidence_required: Fresh install, migration, and same-version refresh paths all copy root package.json into ~/.nexo/package.json
Runtime metadata no longer reports a stale package version after a successful packaged update
Regression coverage pins the installer metadata-sync contract

gates.title: Deep doctor does not imply breakage before the first self-audit artifact exists
evidence_required: Missing self-audit-summary stays advisory when self-audit is disabled or the runtime was just installed/updated
A genuinely missing or stale self-audit summary still degrades once the bootstrap grace window has passed
Regression coverage pins the deep doctor bootstrap contract

gates.title: Package, docs, plugin artifacts, and website tell the same v5.3.10 story
evidence_required: Root package and integration artifacts all point to 5.3.10
README, changelog, llms, and release contract mention packaged runtime truth, evolution telemetry, and synthesis loop closure clearly
Website home, blog, changelog, llms, and sitemap are updated to 5.3.10

gates.title: Weekly Evolution explicitly emits score telemetry and the status surface stays informative when rows are missing
evidence_required: build_evolution_prompt requires all five canonical dimension_scores and score_evidence keys
nexo_evolution_status falls back to the objective file instead of returning a blank status when metrics rows are missing
Regression coverage pins both the prompt contract and the status fallback

gates.title: Startup/update summaries stop being write-only without polluting daily synthesis
evidence_required: nexo-synthesis reads update-last-summary.json only when it contains deferred syncs, bootstrap changes, schedule heals, update notices, or errors
Routine cooldown/no-op summaries remain omitted from synthesis data
Regression coverage pins actionable vs non-actionable ingestion
